pageContext.name: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) Short Hair Version
pageContext.description: Sideshow and FLARE Co. Ltd present the A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) Short Hair Version Figure!  The short-haired version of A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) appearing in the latter half of the Action RPG NieR:Automata has become a figure, with the prototype sculpted by Mitsumasa Yoshizawa (REFLECT).   Cruel Arrogance (spear) and a dedicated stand are included in addition to the main A2 figure which comes with a short hair head type and body without a heat-radiating camisole.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your NieR:Automata collection today!
